---
name: 功能请求 / Feature Request
about: 为新功能或改进提出建议 / Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''

---

<!-- 可以用中文或英文填写 / You may write in either Chinese or English -->

## 这个请求是否源于某个痛点？ / Is Your Request Related to a Problem?

<!-- 清晰简洁地描述问题是什么。例如：每次 [...] 我都很困扰 -->
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...] -->

## 你想要的解决方案 / The Solution You'd Like

<!-- 清晰简洁地描述你希望发生的事情 / A clear and concise description of what you want to happen -->

## 与经典 IC2 的关系 / Relationship to Classic IC2

<!-- 
这个功能在经典 IC2 (1.12.2 及之前) 中存在吗？
- 如果是还原经典功能：请说明原版中的行为 / link 相关 Wiki 页面
- 如果是全新功能：请说明为什么值得加入
Does this feature exist in classic IC2 (1.12.2 or earlier)?
- For backports: describe the original behavior / link relevant wiki pages
- For new features: explain why it's worth adding
-->

## 你考虑过的替代方案 / Alternatives You've Considered

<!-- 清晰简洁地描述任何你考虑过的替代方案或变通方法 -->
<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds -->

## 补充说明 / Additional Context

<!-- 任何其他上下文、截图、或参考链接 / Any other context, screenshots, or reference links -->
